title: Collapsed Summaries Lack Headings

posts.author: snicho (Stephen Nicholson)
posts.cookedHtml:
The latest feature that adds summaries to collapsed groups in a board is great.

However, it’s usefulness is limited because the column headings are not displayed when all groups are collapsed.

It would be much better to have the column headings still displayed at the top of a board, regardless of whether groups are expanded or collapsed.

Without this, a user may not readily identify the purpose of one status column versus another.

posts.author: DallasBentley (Dallas Bentley)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is something that has appeared on my collapsed groups in the last few days. I want to see the full group name when the items are collapsed. Is this a new change?
